sections.paragraph: f. pl. (for זִנְקֹות, זִקֹּות) from the root זָנַק, comp. the similar instances collected in Lehrg. page 145, to which add קִיצֹון for קִצֹּון, אִישׁ for אֵנֶשׁ.) burning darts or arrows, Isa 50:11, i.q. זִקִּים Pro 26:18 (where many copies read זִיקִים. Syr. ܙܝܺܘܐܳ a weapon, thunderbolt).
